description: Just what you’ve been looking for!! This Beautiful townhouse features 3 bed and 3 bath upstairs and 1 bedroom LEGAL SUITE as a mortgage helper, bringing in $1500/M. Perfect for families or even investors. Great location with walking distance to UFV, Mccallum Junction Shopping centre, and HWY 1 access around the corner. This one won’t last long! OPEN HOUSE JAN 17(1-3pm).
